briefdescription.para: Round to nearest int, half away from zero (matches quantize_row_q8_0)
Compute dot product of FP32 input with Q5_0 weight block, with online Q8 quantization.
Compute dot product of FP32 input with Q8_0 weight block, with online Q8 quantization.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, const float *bias, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_fused_q5_0_bias

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, const float *bias, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_fused_q5_0_bias_dispatch

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, const float *bias, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_fused_q8_0_bias

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, const float *bias, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_fused_q8_0_bias_dispatch

briefdescription.para: Fused GEMV kernels with online quantization and bias.

detaileddescription.para:
These kernels fuse:
Quantize FP32 input to Q8_0/Q8_K (no memory write)
GEMV with quantized weights
Bias add

Benefits:
Eliminates memory traffic for quantized activations
Better cache utilization
Reduces total ops in IR from 3 to 1

Kernel signature: gemv_fused_q5_0_bias(y, W, x, bias, M, K)
x: FP32 input [K]
W: Q5_0 weights [M, K]
bias: FP32 bias [M] (can be NULL)
y: FP32 output [M]
